name: RMBG-2.0 Complete
description: Offline RMBG-2.0 background removal runtime for Storyboard Copilot. Intended for internal evaluation and non-commercial validation only. Ships as a standalone Python-bridge extension with GPU PyTorch warmup and local model assets.

hardwareRequirements.summary: This package targets GPU-only RMBG-2.0 inference with a local PyTorch runtime. CUDA availability is required during warmup and execution.
recommendations: Recommended: an NVIDIA GPU with CUDA support and enough VRAM for RMBG-2.0 warmup and repeated single-image inference.
The assembled package is large because it includes a portable Python runtime, the local model snapshot, and runtime cache/output directories.
Use this first version only for internal validation or other non-commercial scenarios until the upstream license is re-evaluated.
notes: The extension preserves the original input dimensions and exports a transparent PNG without default cropping.
The template is assembled into build/extensions/rmbg2-complete and is not intended to be loaded directly before assembly.

startupSteps.label: Validate package
startupSteps.description: Check the runtime entry and model declarations.

startupSteps.label: Verify runtime
startupSteps.description: Check Python, CUDA, and RMBG inference dependencies.

startupSteps.label: Verify models
startupSteps.description: Check the local RMBG-2.0 model snapshot.

startupSteps.label: Warm up runtime
startupSteps.description: Load RMBG-2.0 on the GPU before exposing the canvas node.

startupSteps.label: Register nodes
startupSteps.description: Expose the background removal node to the canvas.
